chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S- 1150 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For Katcha Peshi. 20.10.2016. Mr. Syed Shahzad Ali Shah, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, A.A.G alongwith SIP Syed Amir Hussain on behalf of SSP Jamshoro. -.-.-. Today, learned A.A.G has filed a Statement on behalf of respondent No.1 SSP Jamshoro, wherein he has stated that there is a dispute between the petitioner and private respondents, who are also closely related to each other, and officials respondents are not siding with any of the parties and whenever petitioner will approach the concerned SHO, a protection in accordance with law will be given to him. In view of the above, this petition is disposed of with the directions that private respondents shall not cause harassment to the petitioner and even if they have some dispute that will be resolved in accordance with law and not by taking law in their hands. Learned A.A.G in this regard to issue requisite direction to the official respondents. JUDGE Ali Haider
